headline: AOS Q1 Deep Dive: Margin Pressure and Macroeconomic Headwinds Shape Water Heater Maker’s Outlook
summary: Water heating and treatment solutions company A.O. Smith (NYSE:AOS) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales falling 1.9% year on year to $945.6 million. On the other hand, the company’s outlook for the full year was close to analysts’ estimates with revenue guided to $3.95 billion at the midpoint. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.85 per share was 9.9% below analysts’ consensus estimates.
